summaryForNext: 4 P0 security defects block a production 1.0: REST RLS bypass, unsigned-WASM execution, unenforced Kiln sandbox/authz, empty-stream realtime default. Every P0 has an in-tree precedent (GraphQL acquire() RLS, written-but-unwired signer crates, working listen adapter) so remediation is wiring+tests. Open question for plan: sequence c001-c004 first; decide whether p16 cuts v1.0.1 or re-tags v1.0.0.
